title: Collaboration Presence Display
description: Configuration settings for displaying user presence and awareness in collaborative editing sessions

showUserAvatars.title: Show User Avatars
showUserAvatars.description: Display avatars for all active users in the collaboration session to provide visual identification of participants

showCursorPosition.title: Show Remote Cursor Positions
showCursorPosition.description: Display real-time cursor positions and text selections of other users within notebook cells for enhanced awareness

showSelectionHighlights.title: Show Selection Highlights
showSelectionHighlights.description: Highlight text selections and cell ranges made by other users with colored overlays for better collaborative visibility

presenceIndicatorPosition.title: Presence Indicator Position
presenceIndicatorPosition.description: Choose where to display the user presence bar showing active collaborators - either at the top or bottom of the notebook interface
enumLabels: Top - Display presence bar at the top of the notebook
Bottom - Display presence bar at the bottom of the notebook

userColorScheme.title: User Color Scheme
userColorScheme.description: Color assignment strategy for distinguishing between different users in the collaborative session
enumLabels: Automatic - System-assigned colors optimized for readability and distinction
High Contrast - Bold, high-contrast colors for maximum visibility and accessibility
Pastel - Soft, muted colors that are easy on the eyes during long sessions
Vibrant - Bright, saturated colors that stand out prominently in the interface
